title: HIIT & Tabata Inferno
description: 3-round HIIT with skaters and jump lunges followed by a tabata of squat jumps and flutter kicks

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Butt kicks
exercises.instructions: Run in place, heels to glutes

exercises.name: Inchworms
exercises.instructions: Standing, walk hands forward into a plank, then walk back

exercises.name: Side shuffles
exercises.instructions: Quick lateral shuffles, 3-4 steps each side

exercises.name: Skaters
exercises.instructions: Lateral hops side to side, arms swinging

exercises.name: Burpees
exercises.instructions: Drop down, hands on the floor, jump feet back, push-up, jump up

exercises.name: Box jumps (step)
exercises.instructions: Jump onto a step or low platform, step down

exercises.name: High knees
exercises.instructions: Run in place, knees above hips, arms coordinated

exercises.name: Squat jumps
exercises.instructions: Explosive squat with max jump, land softly

exercises.name: Flutter kicks
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, legs extended, quick flutters

exercises.name: Star jumps
exercises.instructions: Jump spreading arms and legs into a star

exercises.name: Mountain climbers
exercises.instructions: In a plank, drive knees to chest alternating quickly

exercises.name: Standing quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot behind you, knee toward the floor

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: World's greatest stretch
exercises.instructions: Lunge + torso rotation + arm to the sky

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, hold 4s, exhale 6s through the mouth
